title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 361.1032 - Uniformity of application and construction
text:
361.1032.  Uniformity of application and construction. — In applying and construing sections 361.900 to 361.1035, consideration shall be given to the need to promote uniformity of the law with respect to its subject matter among states that enact it.
(L. 2024 S.B. 1359)
